---
title: "ddqc_extension"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-22"
---
```{r}
# Installing and loading packages
if (!requireNamespace("devtools", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("devtools")
if (!requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("Seurat")
if (!requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("ggplot2")
if (!requireNamespace("dplyr", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("dplyr")
if (!requireNamespace("patchwork", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("patchwork")
if (!requireNamespace("tibble", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("tibble")
if (!requireNamespace("RColorBrewer", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("RColorBrewer")

if (!requireNamespace("ddqcR", quietly = TRUE)) {
  devtools::install_github("ayshwaryas/ddqc_R")
}

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(tibble)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ddqcR)
```

```{r}
# File paths
healthy_rds <- "/projectnb/ds596/projects/Team 9/scQC_project/data/extension_kidney/GSE171314_scRNA_healthy.rds"
disease_rds <- "/projectnb/ds596/projects/Team 9/scQC_project/data/extension_kidney/GSE171314_scRNA_disease.rds"
```

```{r}
# Reading the objects
healthy <- readRDS(healthy_rds)
disease <- readRDS(disease_rds)

# Adding the condition labels
healthy$condition <- "Healthy"
disease$condition <- "Disease"

healthy <- RenameCells(healthy, add.cell.id = "Healthy")
disease <- RenameCells(disease, add.cell.id = "Disease")

seu <- merge(healthy, y = disease, project = "Kidney_DDQC")

cat("Total cells before QC:", ncol(seu), "\n")
print(table(seu$condition))
```

```{r}
# Running the basic QC
seu_basic <- initialQC(
  data = seu,
  basic.n.genes = 100,
  basic.percent.mt = 80,
  mt.prefix = "MT-",
  rb.prefix = "^RP[SL][[:digit:]]|^RPLP[[:digit:]]|^RPSA"
)

cat("Cells after basic QC:", ncol(seu_basic), "\n")
print(table(seu_basic$condition))
```

```{r}
# Running DDQC
df.qc <- ddqc.metrics(
  data = seu_basic,
  n.pcs = 50,
  k.param = 20,
  res = 1.4,
  threshold = 2,
  do.counts = TRUE,
  do.genes = TRUE,
  do.mito = TRUE,
  do.ribo = FALSE,
  n.genes.lower.bound = 200,
  percent.mito.upper.bound = 10,
  random.state = 29
)

cat("DDQC pass/fail summary:\n")
print(table(df.qc$passed.qc))

# Filter with DDQC
seu_ddqc <- filterData(seu_basic, df.qc)

cat("Cells after DDQC:", ncol(seu_ddqc), "\n")
print(table(seu_ddqc$condition))
```


```{r}
run_pipeline <- function(obj, resolution_value = 1.4, npcs_use = 50) {
  obj <- NormalizeData(obj, verbose = FALSE)
  obj <- FindVariableFeatures(
    obj,
    selection.method = "vst",
    nfeatures = 2000,
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  obj <- ScaleData(obj, verbose = FALSE)
  obj <- RunPCA(obj, npcs = npcs_use, verbose = FALSE)
  obj <- FindNeighbors(obj, dims = 1:npcs_use, k.param = 20, verbose = FALSE)
  obj <- FindClusters(obj, resolution = resolution_value, verbose = FALSE)
  obj <- RunUMAP(obj, dims = 1:20, reduction = "pca", verbose = FALSE)
  return(obj)
}

# Running pipeline for before and after DDQC
seu_before <- run_pipeline(seu_basic, resolution_value = 1.4, npcs_use = 50)
seu_after  <- run_pipeline(seu_ddqc, resolution_value = 1.4, npcs_use = 50)
```

```{r}
# Generating the QC summary table
before_counts <- table(seu$condition)
basic_counts  <- table(seu_basic$condition)
ddqc_counts   <- table(seu_ddqc$condition)

conds <- union(names(before_counts), union(names(basic_counts), names(ddqc_counts)))

qc_summary <- data.frame(
  Condition = conds,
  Before_QC = as.numeric(before_counts[conds]),
  After_Basic_QC = as.numeric(basic_counts[conds]),
  After_DDQC = as.numeric(ddqc_counts[conds])
)

qc_summary[is.na(qc_summary)] <- 0

qc_summary <- qc_summary %>%
  mutate(
    Basic_QC_Removed = Before_QC - After_Basic_QC,
    DDQC_Removed = After_Basic_QC - After_DDQC,
    Percent_Retained_After_DDQC = round((After_DDQC / Before_QC) * 100, 2)
  )

print(qc_summary)

write.csv(qc_summary, "kidney_ddqc_condition_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Generating the cluster count summary
cluster_summary <- data.frame(
  Dataset = c("Before_DDQC", "After_DDQC"),
  Cells = c(ncol(seu_before), ncol(seu_after)),
  Clusters = c(
    length(unique(seu_before$seurat_clusters)),
    length(unique(seu_after$seurat_clusters))
  )
)

print(cluster_summary)

write.csv(cluster_summary, "kidney_ddqc_cluster_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Creating UMAPs based on clusters 
p_before_clusters <- DimPlot(
  seu_before,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  label = TRUE,
  repel = TRUE,
  pt.size = 0.4
) +
  ggtitle("Pre-DDQC UMAP (clusters)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )

p_after_clusters <- DimPlot(
  seu_after,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  label = TRUE,
  repel = TRUE,
  pt.size = 0.4
) +
  ggtitle("Post-DDQC UMAP (clusters)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )

p_clusters_compare <- p_before_clusters + p_after_clusters +
  plot_annotation(title = "Kidney healthy vs disease: cluster structure before and after DDQC")

print(p_clusters_compare)

ggsave(
  "kidney_ddqc_clusters_before_after.png",
  p_clusters_compare,
  width = 14,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
# Creating UMAPs based on the condition
p_before_condition <- DimPlot(
  seu_before,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "condition",
  pt.size = 0.4
) +
  ggtitle("Pre-DDQC UMAP (Healthy vs Disease)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )

p_after_condition <- DimPlot(
  seu_after,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "condition",
  pt.size = 0.4
) +
  ggtitle("Post-DDQC UMAP (Healthy vs Disease)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )

p_condition_compare <- p_before_condition + p_after_condition +
  plot_annotation(title = "Kidney healthy vs disease: condition structure before and after DDQC")

print(p_condition_compare)

ggsave(
  "kidney_ddqc_condition_before_after.png",
  p_condition_compare,
  width = 14,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
# Creating split UMAPs for comparison
p_before_split <- DimPlot(
  seu_before,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  split.by = "condition",
  label = TRUE,
  repel = TRUE,
  pt.size = 0.35,
  ncol = 2
) +
  ggtitle("Pre-DDQC clusters split by condition") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )

p_after_split <- DimPlot(
  seu_after,
  reduction = "umap",
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  split.by = "condition",
  label = TRUE,
  repel = TRUE,
  pt.size = 0.35,
  ncol = 2
) +
  ggtitle("Post-DDQC clusters split by condition") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )

print(p_before_split)
print(p_after_split)

ggsave(
  "kidney_ddqc_split_before.png",
  p_before_split,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  "kidney_ddqc_split_after.png",
  p_after_split,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
# Saving the final Seurat objects
saveRDS(seu_before, file = "kidney_pre_ddqc_seurat.rds")
saveRDS(seu_after,  file = "kidney_post_ddqc_seurat.rds")

cat("- kidney_ddqc_condition_summary.csv\n")
cat("- kidney_ddqc_cluster_summary.csv\n")
cat("- kidney_ddqc_clusters_before_after.png\n")
cat("- kidney_ddqc_condition_before_after.png\n")
cat("- kidney_ddqc_split_before.png\n")
cat("- kidney_ddqc_split_after.png\n")
cat("- kidney_pre_ddqc_seurat.rds\n")
cat("- kidney_post_ddqc_seurat.rds\n")
```
